mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_jury_vote (dispute_id, voter_id, vote_side, vote_time) VALUES (#{disputeId}, #{voterId}, #{voteSide}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM t_jury_vote WHERE dispute_id = #{disputeId} AND voter_id = #{voterId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_jury_vote WHERE dispute_id = #{disputeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_jury_vote WHERE dispute_id = #{disputeId} AND vote_side = #{voteSide}
